name: OpenBrain Native
description: First-class OpenBrain MCP tools without shell wrappers

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token if endpoint expects Authorization header

envelopeMode.description: When true, embeds category/tags/source metadata in a stable OBMETA v1 text envelope for MCP servers that only accept content

url.label: OpenBrain MCP URL
url.help: HTTP MCP endpoint for OpenBrain (can include ?key=... if your deployment uses URL keys)

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional bearer token for Authorization header

envelopeMode.label: Metadata envelope mode
envelopeMode.help: Enable OBMETA v1 text envelope fallback for servers without structured capture metadata
